campaigns.title: Ultimate 2026 AI Roadmap Video Clips
campaigns.instructions: Extract high-impact tips about AI agents. Keep clips between 20-55 seconds. Add bold auto-captions and a zoom transition on important points.

campaigns.title: React 19 Hooks Tutorial Clips
campaigns.instructions: Focus on the useActionState hook. Cut the code explanation down to 40 seconds. Highlight the loading boundary.

submissions.feedback: Great edits on this clip! Subtitles are extremely visible.
